title: Submit an Application for a Grant
description: Universities, nonprofits and commercial entities may submit grant proposals to enter into a contractual relationship with the Office of Naval Research.
text:
All full applications are submitted under the specific announcement to ONR through grants.gov. Use the application package cited in the announcement found at www.grants.gov.
Please use the Travel Estimate Spreadsheet to provide proposed travel costs.
Please use the following Privacy Act and Burden Statement for the Common Form for Biographical Sketch and Current and Pending (Other) Support Information:
Privacy Act Statement
Authority: The information requested on this form is collected under the authority of the Government Paperwork Elimination Act (Pub. L. 105-277, 44 U.S.C. 3504); Executive Order 12372, Intergovernmental Review of Federal Programs; and other relevant statutes and regulations.
Purpose: The primary purpose of collecting this information is to process your application for federal assistance. The information will be used to determine eligibility, process the application, and manage the assistance program.
Routine Uses: The information on this form will be used in connection with the selection of qualified proposals. The information requested may be disclosed to qualified reviewers as part of the proposal review process; to proposer institutions/grantees to provide or obtain data regarding the proposal review process, award decisions, or the administration of awards; to government contractors, experts, volunteers and researchers and educators as necessary to complete assigned work; to other government agencies or other entities needing information regarding Proposers or nominees as part of a joint application review process, or in order to coordinate programs or policy; and to another Federal agency, court, or party in a court or Federal administrative proceeding if the government is a party.
Disclosure: Providing the requested information is voluntary. However, failure to provide the information may result in a delay or denial of your application for federal assistance.
Rights: Under the Privacy Act, you have the right to access and amend your personal information held by the agency. For more information about your rights, please contact the agency’s Privacy Officer.
